acceptance_criteria.description: Users must not be able to access any page without first logging in with valid credentials.
kane_steps: Navigate directly to https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in
Observe that the user is redirected back to the login page
Confirm no protected content is visible without authentication
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Protected pages redirect unauthenticated users to login

acceptance_criteria.description: After successfully logging in with valid credentials, the user is redirected to the product inventory page.
kane_steps: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
Enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'
Click the login button
Verify the user lands on the inventory page at /inventory.html
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Successful login redirects to inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page displays product tiles each containing a product name, image, and price.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials
Navigate to the inventory page
Verify each product tile shows a product name, an image, and a price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Inventory tiles show name, image, and price

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product name on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the name of any product
Verify the product detail page opens and displays the correct product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product name opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product image on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the image of any product
Verify the product detail page opens and displays the correct product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product image opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page displays the product name, description, price, and an Add to Cart button.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on any product to open its detail page
Verify the page shows the product name, description, price, and an 'Add to cart' button
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Detail page shows name, description, price, add button

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can add a product to the cart from the inventory page using the Add to Cart button.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate any product tile and click its 'Add to cart' button
Verify the product is added to the cart
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button works from inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking Add to Cart on the inventory page, the button label for that product changes to Remove.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click 'Add to cart' on any product
Verify the button label for that product changes to 'Remove'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button changes to Remove after click

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart badge in the top navigation updates to reflect the current number of items added to the cart.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click 'Add to cart' on one product
Verify the cart badge shows '1'
Add another product and verify the badge updates to '2'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart badge count updates on item addition

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can remove a product from the cart directly from the inventory page by clicking the Remove button.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on the same product tile
Verify the product is removed from the cart
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button removes item from cart on inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking Remove on the inventory page, the button label changes back to Add to Cart.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on that product
Verify the button label reverts to 'Add to cart'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button reverts to Add to cart label

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can navigate to the cart page at /cart.html.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the cart icon in the top navigation
Verify the URL changes to /cart.html and the cart page is displayed

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart page lists all items that have been added, showing each item's name, quantity, and price.
kane_steps: Log in and add one or more products to the cart
Navigate to /cart.html
Verify each added item appears with its correct name, quantity, and price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart page lists items with name, quantity, price

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can sort products on the inventory page using the sort dropdown located in the top right.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate the sort dropdown in the top right
Click the dropdown and verify the sort options are available and selectable
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown is present and functional on inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The sort dropdown contains exactly four options: Name (A to Z), Name (Z to A), Price (low to high), and Price (high to low).
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the sort dropdown
Verify the four options 'Name (A to Z)', 'Name (Z to A)', 'Price (low to high)', and 'Price (high to low)' are all present
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown contains all four expected options

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Price (low to high)' sorts the product list so that the cheapest product (Sauce Labs Onesie at $7.99) appears first.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product displayed is 'Sauce Labs Onesie' priced at $7.99
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Price low to high shows cheapest product first

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Name (A to Z)' sorts the product list alphabetically so that Sauce Labs Backpack appears first.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Name (A to Z)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product displayed is 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Name A to Z shows Sauce Labs Backpack first
